sections.title: Summary Financials
sections.content:
| $000 | FY21 | FY22 | FY23 | TTM Jun-24 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Revenue | 40498 | 50299 | 62355 | 68554 |
| Gross profit | 32799 | 39596 | 49004 | 52961 |
| EBITDA, reported | 11661 | 13948 | 19766 | 22269 |
| EBITDA margin, reported | 28.8% | 27.7% | 31.7% | 32.5% |
- Core earnings trend improved over the period, but normalized quality requires adjustment analysis.

sections.title: P&L Walkthrough
sections.content:
| Line item | FY22 | FY23 | TTM Jun-24 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Revenue | 50299 | 62355 | 68554 |
| Variable expense | -10703 | -13351 | -15593 |
| Gross profit | 39596 | 49004 | 52961 |
| Compensation | -15131 | -16943 | -17132 |
| Operating profit | 10682 | 16752 | 19218 |
| EBITDA, reported | 13948 | 19766 | 22269 |
- Revenue expansion reflects transaction growth and card issuance contribution.
- Variable expense moved with volume mix and pass-through fee profile.
- EBITDA conversion improved despite support-capacity reinvestment.

sections.title: Quality Of Earnings Overview
sections.content:
| Adjustment bridge ($000) | FY22 | FY23 | TTM Jun-24 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| EBITDA, reported | 13948 | 19766 | 22269 |
| Due diligence adjustments | 1332 | -1669 | -566 |
| Pro forma adjustments | 1661 | 1907 | -318 |
| EBITDA, pro forma adjusted | 16641 | 20027 | 22021 |
| EBITDA margin, pro forma | 28.7% | 30.0% | 31.2% |
- Quality of earnings remains strong; major movements are transparent and reconcilable.

sections.title: Pro Forma Adjustment Drivers
sections.content:
- Settlement services run-rate impact: -45
- Open positions normalization impact: -224
- Software maintenance run-rate impact: -596
- Data center facility costs impact: -48
- Other one-time adjustments impact: +33
- Net pro forma impact: -880
- Interpretation: run-rate normalization is concentrated in staffing and software cost lines.

sections.title: Net Working Capital Overview
sections.content:
| Net working capital ($000) | FY21 | FY22 | FY23 | TTM Jun-24 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Net working capital, reported | 3176 | 2815 | 8705 | 5152 |
| Due diligence adjustments | 2271 | 3018 | 783 | -180 |
| Pro forma adjustments | 612 | 773 | -2647 | 0 |
| Net working capital, adjusted | 6058 | 6606 | 6841 | 4971 |
| Adjusted NWC as % of net sales | 12.3% | 11.4% | 10.2% | 7.0% |
- Adjusted average net working capital for TTM Jun-24 is $6.1 million.

sections.title: Working Capital Risks And Mitigations
sections.content:
- Risk: AR timing normalization could increase quarter-end cash pressure.
- Risk: AP run-rate assumptions may reverse temporary cash benefit.
- Risk: Settlement receivable volatility can obscure true liquidity profile.
- Mitigation: Weekly aging review for top 20 receivable balances.
- Mitigation: Payment calendar governance aligned to vendor criticality.
- Mitigation: Liquidity trigger thresholds tied to DSO and conversion trends.

sections.title: Margin Bridge
sections.content:
- Revenue growth contribution: 2.8
- Pass-through recovery contribution: 1.1
- Pricing/mix contribution: 0.9
- Productivity contribution: 1.0
- Inflation and support drag: -0.6
- Net margin movement: 5.2
- Margin expansion is operationally supported, not solely accounting normalization.

sections.title: Source Appendix
sections.content:
- Source pack includes: internal financial statements, management P&L package, QoE adjustment workbook.
- Reconciliations include: reported-to-adjusted EBITDA bridge, NWC normalization bridge, margin bridge support.
- Assumptions include: staffing run-rate normalization, software contract run-rate, payment timing normalization.
